summary: Tested GKKS Vivah Step 2 — Admin CSV Import Tool. All 24 backend tests passed and all frontend flows verified via Playwright. Backend CSV parsing, auth, mapping, dry-run, and normalization all working. Frontend home screen, admin auth, step bar, and import screen all rendering correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: expo-document-picker version mismatch: installed 55.0.8, expected ~14.0.8. May cause issues on native but works on web preview.

logger used in csv_import before it is defined (logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) is at bottom of file). This won't crash Python due to module-level execution order, but is a code smell — logger should be defined near the top.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 2 fully verified. DB tables (profiles, admin_log) don't exist yet (SQL migration Step 1 pending) so actual imports will fail with 404 from Supabase — expected behavior. All CSV parsing/dry-run logic works without DB.
